# Let's implement normalization and search functions
import re, unicodedata, math, sys, collections

arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED\u0640]""")

def normalize_ar(text):
    if not text:
        return ""
    # replace tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640','')
    # remove diacritics
    text = arabic_diacritics.sub('', text)
    # unify hamza forms: replace various hamzas with bare hamza 'ء' or alef? choose 'ء'
    text = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0624\u0626]', '\u0621', text) # map آ أ إ ؤ ئ to ء
    # remove punctuation (keeping Arabic letters and numbers)
    # But also keep Arabic letters and spaces, remove other stuff
    text = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', text)
    # collapse multiple spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

# normalize database entries into a list of (index, normalized_text)
q_norms = []
for i, item in enumerate(qdata):
    at = item.get('ayah_text','')
    q_norms.append((i, normalize_ar(at)))
h_norms = []
for i, item in enumerate(hdata):
    # hadiths: hadithTxt and Matn fields. We'll search both but prefer hadithTxt? Matn maybe same.
    ht = item.get('hadithTxt') or item.get('Matn') or ''
    h_norms.append((i, normalize_ar(ht)))

query_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
query_snip = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"

qf = normalize_ar(query_full)
qs = normalize_ar(query_snip.replace('...','')) # remove ellipsis
qf, qs

# compute top similar matches in hadiths for normalized full query (qf)

for idx, norm in h_norms:
    s = sim_ratio(qf, norm)
    top_h.append((s, idx, norm))
top_h_sorted = sorted(top_h, reverse=True)[:20]
top_h_sorted[:20]
